no: Artisan's Kitpack - tweaks submod Adds a variety of kits for single-classed Druids, Fighters, Paladins, Rangers, Thieves, Shamans, and Sors.Install Artisan’s Kitpack before Emily and Skills and Abilities.
sum: Assigns custom kits from the Artisan's Kitpack to existing NPCs like Khalid, Minsc, and others, with options for different kit assignments.

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Archer - Apply Manyshot to mod-added items (install this after any mods that add mod bows and crossbows)
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Archer - Apply Manyshot to mod-added items (install this after any mods that add mod bows and crossbows)

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Beastmaster - Modify Restrictions for Mod Items (install this after any mods that add mod axes, daggers, spears, armor, etc.
co.no: Technically it only needs to go at the end of AK's main components and after Shadow Magic, but let's keep the whole of the tweak submod together
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Beastmaster - Modify Restrictions for Mod Items (install this after any mods that add mod axes, daggers, spears, armor, etc.)

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Cavalier - Rename Kit to Chevalier
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Cavalier - Rename Kit to Chevalier

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Dreadnought - Set Dreadnought to 1 APR (install this if the Dreadnought is getting bonus APR from other mods)
co.no: known mods to preempt: new kits, TNT, Olvyn Tweaks "monks deflect missiles", ToF's revised weapon proficiency
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Dreadnought - Set Dreadnought and Siegemaster to 1 APR (install this if the Dreadnought or Siegemaster is getting bonus APR from other mods)

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Samurai - Add important effects to mod-added items installed after the kit
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Samurai - Add important effects to mod-added items installed after the kit

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mystic Fire - Allow Wands and Mage Scrolls
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mystic Fire - Allow Wands and Mage Scrolls

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mystic Fire - Add spells from HLAs directly to spellbook up to maximum paladin casting level
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mystic Fire - Add spells from HLAs directly to spellbook up to maximum paladin casting level

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Trickster - Mimic Mod Kit Abilities (install this after other kits!)
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Trickster - Mimic Mod Kit Abilities (install this after other kits!)

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Arcane Trickster (Sorcerer) - Enable Thief Equipment
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Arcane Trickster (Sorcerer) - Enable Thief Equipment

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Adjust kit THAC0 progression to match tweaked THAC0 tables
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Adjust kit THAC0 progression to match tweaked THAC0 tables

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mage - Rename to Wizard
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Mage - Rename to Wizard

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Thief - Rename to Rogue
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Thief - Rename to Rogue

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Favored Soul - Patch Cleric-exclusive spells from mods
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Favored Soul - Patch Cleric-exclusive spells from mods

co.n: Artisan's Kitpack: Update EEex-based Weapon Usability Changes
co.tp2n: Artisan's Kitpack: Update EEex-based Weapon Usability Changes
